description.value: Price 6,000 gp; Slot none; CL 5th; Weight 5 lbs.; Aura moderate conjuration DESCRIPTION This concertina was created by a notorious bard. It can be used like a masterwork concertina, providing a +2 bonus on Perform (keyboard instruments) checks. At any one time, the squeeze-box is either more compressed than extended or more extended than compressed, and switching between the two is a free action (and in fact, happens regularly when the instrument is played). When the concertina is compressed and held in a hand, the wielder gains the compression ability. When the concertina is extended and held in a hand, the wielder is immune to constriction damage (as from constrict attacks) and damage from being buried, although the wielder gains no protection from suffocation. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 3,000 gp; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells cushioning bands, grease
